calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Aug-21-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Claire Sullivan for Margery Ann Cunningham (Petitioner).

The Court stated that before it is a Petition for Order Confirming Trust Assets and that there is an issue of whether or not the Trustor's intent was to include certain annuities in the trust. Ms. Sullivan stated that they submitted a petition to address these issues, that all assets were transferred except these two annuities, that these two annuities are unique in that they hold retirement benefits, that the decedent set them up while he was working, that they were surrendered & reissued when the decedent was 90 years old which was 3 years before his passing, that this was just an oversight, and that there is a pourover will. The Court inquired about anyone contacting the financial institution. Ms. Sullivan stated that they asked but that they didn't have the records on file, that the petitioner & her Son have tried to contact the Teachers Insurance and Annuity Association (TIAA), that TIAA will not give them any information because they are not on the accounts, and that they are comfortable with what has been submitted to the Court. At the conclusion of Ms. Sullivan's argument, the Court took the Petition for Order Confirming Trust Assets under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Matter not reported.

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Jul-09-2019 Continued To Aug-13-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
